name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Changed

- UniBridge_ContextSnapshot now includes an agentBrief onboarding block by default, summarizing project shape, likely folders/systems, risk flags, guardrails, active WorkSession state, and recommended next UniBridge calls.

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_WorkSession captures an optional compact loaded-scene semantic baseline at Begin and includes semantic review data in Status/Review and active WorkSession auto-review blocks.
- Semantic review reports scene-object changes by stable object id.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload.
